name: luly-v0-5-0
description: Author Luly flows end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. v0.5.0 (minor — new block model: sections + containers): regenerated to match luly-app's nodeId/parentNodeId refactor and the new block system. Screens now hold MULTIPLE blocks composed as a tree — `container` (responsive row/column with per-child `flex`), `section` (full-bleed band), and `slider` (carousel) hold child blocks, nested in the screen's flat block list via `parentSlug` + `lexoRank` (exactly what the CMS editor mints and what import expects). The retired monolithic composites (`image-richtext` / `quiz-text` / `form-text`) are NO LONGER EMITTED — the `media-text` / `quiz-text` / `form-text` preset sugar now expands to a real `container` with two flex children (3 / 4), matching the app's getSampleContentForFormat defaults. content.md gains a `+++` block delimiter plus `as:` / `parent:` / `flex:` / `slot:` for nesting; new leaf formats `animation` and `button`. The validator now checks parentSlug integrity + lexoRank uniqueness per screen, adds nodeId/parentNodeId to the audit-field denylist, and recognizes the new space/learning_path content types. The assembler's reslug is now parentSlug-aware so cloned stub courses keep their nesting. The bundled stub-course.json and the app's product-templates were regenerated into the new model, and the dead block-validation.ts was removed. Navigation/controls fixes: simple presets (campaign-simple / waitlist / interactive-proposal) now emit the hub + course + lesson auto-nav controls they were missing — previously the course/lesson had no navigation action, so every simple flow failed validation and couldn't descend hub→course→lesson→screen. And lesson-screen Next controls are now position-baked at generation time, so `finishLesson` lands ONLY on the actual LAST screen of a lesson (replacing the runtime `isLastScreen` guard whose old misfire could finish a lesson from its first screen); applied to authored AND stub-course screens. Controls are now driven by the real content screens (not the plan), so positions/keys stay correct even when fill splits a screen. v0.4.1 (patch): the course landing screen now has a 'Back' button (→ parent = the academy hub) alongside 'Learn' — previously a course only offered 'Learn' with no way back to the hub. Added to both authored courses (controls-presets courseControls) and template/stub courses (bundled fixture), mirroring the canonical academy template. Stub clones also get fresh control ids so repeated stubs don't share control identity. v0.4.0 (minor — template courses): an academy can now carry multiple courses, where extra ones are content-less 'template' stubs (a real catalog card — title + description — backed by a default 3-lesson scaffold the user fills later in the CMS). Strictly OPT-IN: default behavior is one authored course; stubs are added only when the user asks for several/placeholder courses or clearly lists course topics. /luly-plan emits an optional `## Template courses` list (Title | description); omitting the `## Section N` blocks yields an onboarding-only academy with just stubs. The assembler builds each stub from a bundled, sanitized copy of the app's default-course template (Onboarding + Completion lessons removed; screen backgrounds + control color overrides stripped so the PRODUCT THEME applies to every screen — no custom backgrounds), gives every node a fresh slug (controls use relative targets, no reference rewrite), and uses the flow's shared branded placeholder for card + icon. v0.3.3 (patch — logos & image sizes): (1) Real-logo bug fix — the assembler's loadInlineSvg required SVG markup to start with `<svg`, so real downloaded brand logos that lead with an `<?xml?>` prolog / `<!DOCTYPE>` / comments (Wikipedia, CDNs) were silently dropped — no header logo, no hub logo. It now slices from the first `<svg`, so real logos inline correctly. (2) Logo priority — header prefers the icon-only mark (short), hub prefers the lockup-with-name (long); PNG/JPEG URLs accepted as fallback. (3) Logos are real-or-asked, never fabricated — when no real logo/icon is found after the full research ladder, the pipeline asks the user (abstract stand-in vs neutral placeholder) instead of drawing a fake; dead `hub-logo.svg` generation removed. (4) Card covers are abstract — no text, no wordmark, no literal product; calm brand-color shapes. (5) Image sizes aligned to the app: media placeholder is SQUARE 800×800 (app media block defaults to 1:1), card cover is a wide ~10:3 banner (1600×480) matching the app default card.png (503×151, cover-cropped fixed-height), icon stays 1:1. v0.3.2 (patch): fix a v0.3.1 regression — the post-assembly validator still REQUIRED `body.theme.layout`, but v0.3.1 made the assembler omit `layout` when a flow has no overrides (the common case), so every default flow failed validation with "body.theme.layout missing" and had to be hand-patched. The validator now treats `layout` as optional (validates its shape only when present), matching the assembler and the app renderer (which falls back to the 1480px desktop default when layout is absent). v0.3.1 (minor — schema accuracy, mobile/desktop, color application): (1) Layout-token fix — flow-level layout overrides use the renderer's suffixed keys `maxWidthDesktop` / `paddingDesktop` (+ `*Mobile`); the old bare `maxWidth` default was silently ignored and is dropped, so flows keep the app default desktop width (1480px) unless deliberately overridden. (2) Color application — luly-style now documents where key tokens actually render (quiz answer cards: `onSurface` unselected, `primaryLight` selected, `successLight` correct, `failureLight` wrong; `secondary` dark callouts with `textOnPrimary` text) and adds mandatory contrast targets for those answer-card and dark-callout pairs. (3) Per-viewport awareness — skills now reference the `*Mobile` style tokens and per-block margin model (`margin*` / `margin*Mobile`, defaults top 16 / bottom 0) as polishing levers for the future agentic-edit scope, explicitly NOT emitted during simple generation.
